description_long: This object is a shoulder-fired rocket-propelled grenade launcher, commonly known as an RPG-7. It features a long cylindrical tube with a flared black muzzle at the rear and a conical, olive-green warhead at the front. The main body is finished in a reddish-brown color, likely simulating a wooden or composite handguard, with black metallic components including the trigger assembly and sighting mechanism. The launcher has a prominent pistol grip and a secondary forward grip, both in a dark color, for stability during use. The warhead is attached at the front, with visible fins and a pointed tip, indicating its function as a projectile weapon. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and wood or polymer materials, with a utilitarian, rugged design typical of military ordnance.
description: A shoulder-fired RPG-7 launcher with a brown handguard, black metal components, and an olive-green conical warhead attached at the front.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the launcher, brown handguard, black muzzle, and attached olive-green warhead.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed warhead tip and the circular muzzle opening at the rear.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the trigger and grip assembly.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the flared black muzzle and the cylindrical body, with the warhead's tail fins visible at the front.
